HomePage.testimonials-slogan: Join creators generating AI videos and images every day.

what.title: What Can AIO Do?
what.description: Two powerful AI tools in one platform — image-to-video animation powered by Kling v2.1, and text-to-image generation powered by Flux 1.1 Pro.
what.itemDescription1: Upload a photo as the first frame. Kling v2.1 animates it based on your motion prompt — choose 16:9, 9:16, or 1:1, and 5s or 10s.
what.itemDescription2: Type a description and Flux 1.1 Pro renders a high-quality 1024×1024 image. No source photo required.
what.itemDescription3: Upload → Prompt → Select format → Generate. Results are saved to your Workspace automatically.
what.itemDescription4: Designed for anyone. No video editing software or technical background required.

how.title: How to Create Your First AI Video
how.description: Generate an AI video in three steps:
how.item1: Upload a clear, well-lit photo as your starting frame.
how.item2: Describe the motion: camera moves, character actions, mood, or lighting.
how.item3: Select aspect ratio (16:9 / 9:16 / 1:1) and duration (5s or 10s), then generate.

testimonials.title: What Our Users Say
testimonials.description: See how AIO has helped people turn photos into moving stories.

FAQ.title: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.Q1: Do I need to upload an image to generate a video?
FAQ.A1: Yes. The video generation tool (Kling v2.1) requires a start image — it animates from your uploaded photo. A text-only prompt without an image is not supported in the current video generator.
FAQ.Q2: Can I choose the video aspect ratio and duration?
FAQ.A2: Yes. Before generating, you can choose aspect ratio (16:9 landscape, 9:16 portrait, or 1:1 square) and duration (5 seconds or 10 seconds).
FAQ.Q3: What resolution will my video be?
FAQ.A3: Resolution is determined automatically by Kling v2.1 (typically HD quality). It is not a separately configurable parameter.
FAQ.Q4: How long does video generation take?
FAQ.A4: Typically 2 to 3 minutes. You can safely leave the page — all results are saved to your Workspace.
FAQ.Q5: What is included in the free plan?
FAQ.A5: You receive 20 free credits on signup. Each video generation costs 15 credits; each image generation costs 1 credit.
FAQ.Q6: How do I cancel my subscription?
FAQ.A6: Email our support team at support@ai-videogenerator.app. Your plan remains active until the end of your billing period — no hidden charges.

Features.heading: Two AI Tools, One Platform
Features.subheading: Image-to-video animation and text-to-image generation, powered by state-of-the-art models.

feature1.title: Image to Video (Kling v2.1)
feature1.description: Animate any photo into a smooth HD video. Choose aspect ratio and duration before generating.

feature2.title: Text to Image (Flux 1.1 Pro)
feature2.description: Generate a high-quality 1024×1024 image from a text prompt. No source photo needed.

feature3.title: Flexible Aspect Ratios
feature3.description: 16:9 for landscape, 9:16 for portrait / short-form, or 1:1 for square content.

feature4.title: 5s or 10s Video Duration
feature4.description: Generate a 5-second quick clip or a 10-second extended sequence. Your choice before generation.

feature5.title: Workspace & History
feature5.description: All generated videos and images are saved to your personal Workspace. Download or review them any time.

feature6.title: Privacy & Data Protection
feature6.description: Your uploads are processed securely. Generated results are stored in your private Workspace only.

Pricing.title: Flexible Pricing Plans
Pricing.description: Start free with 20 credits. Each video generation costs 15 credits; each image generation costs 1 credit.

seo.title: AIO Pricing – Plans for Every Creator
seo.description: Simple, transparent pricing for AI video and image generation. Start free, scale as you grow.

FAQ.title: Subscription & Billing Questions
FAQ.A1: Yes. Email us at support@ai-videogenerator.com. Your subscription stays active until the end of the billing cycle.
FAQ.Q2: Do you offer monthly and annual plans?
FAQ.A2: Yes — monthly for flexibility, annual for the best price per credit.
FAQ.A3: The annual plan gives you the lowest cost per credit. Ideal for regular creators.
FAQ.A4: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade at any time.
FAQ.Q5: How many credits does each generation use?
FAQ.A5: Video generation (Kling v2.1) costs 15 credits per video. Image generation (Flux 1.1 Pro) costs 1 credit per image.
FAQ.Q6: What if I run out of credits?
FAQ.A6: You can purchase one-time credit packs at any time without changing your subscription.
FAQ.A7: Yes — every new account receives 20 free credits on signup. That's enough for one video generation or 20 image generations.
FAQ.A8: Reach out via email or live chat. We typically respond within 24 hours.
FAQ.Q9: Do I need to install anything?
FAQ.A9: No. AIO is fully web-based. All you need is a browser and an internet connection.
FAQ.A10: Yes — all payments are handled via Creem with industry-standard encryption.
